By the fig and the olive;Footnote-1
and by this city (of Makkah), a haven of peace:
surely We created man in the best mould;Footnote-3
then We reverted him to the lowest of the low,Footnote-4
except those who have faith and do righteous deeds. Theirs is a never ending reward.Footnote-5
Who, then, can give the lie to you, (O Prophet), about the Reward and the Punishment?Footnote-6
Is not Allah the Greatest of all sovereigns?Footnote-7
